creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Created attachment 256478
Patch for portmaster

The patch applies corrections according to /usr/ports/CHANGELOG :

[...]
20240229:
AUTHOR: tijl@FreeBSD.org
...

where the ${SETENV} env. varibale is expanded according accordingly.

This patch makes portmaster, traditional make and poudriere happy. 

Bump PORTREVISION
